title: Genesis resource pack
description: The first and original  HD alien/Scifi themed resourcepack with PBR materials. Now on Modrinth
body:
Will work with 1.14-1-1.21 Just ignore the warning. 👍✅

I have reworked my pack to work better with shaders like the Bliss shaders. It will work with many others but some materials and textures will have a different look but in all it will work with most shaders out there. I recommend Bliss shaders or Sonic Ethers PTGI shaders even if that shader is getting old.

Here on Modrinth you can try my v.2.2 64x64 version for free

My pack in unique in the way that this is the ONLY Ultra high res PBR based texture pack that is focused on Scifi / alien/futuristic style
so you will be getting a totally different experience than you will get from other Ultra-high packs that mostly deliver photo-realistic natural experience. They are all excellent and you should try them too but they are very similar.

Mine is different 😎👍

I suggest you try out the Free version and if you like what you see, then I recommend to level up to 512x512 and above if you can. It is at those resolutions that the texture pack really starts to shine and you can enjoy the dynamic between textures, light, and reflection. Just watch my videos and you will get the picture... literally 😋 (pun intended)

Go to my Patreon page for the juicy hires versions (256-512-1024 resolution)
[PATREON](https://www.patreon.com/c/G3N3ZIS)
